title: M&SENSE Pink Beach Jar Candle, 550g Pineapple & Coconut Scented Natural Soy Candles for Home Scented, 110 Hour Burn Time, Home Decor Gift for Women, Friends, Family, Colleagues, Couples
features: Clean Consistent & Even Burn : Using 2 handmade lead-free cotton wicks for a even burn result. They're cotton flat braid wicks with paper throughout, providing increased rigidity and burn more consistently than 101% cotton wicks. Designed to reduce carbon buildup which leads to black soot.

Perfume Grade Fragrance Oils :The fragrances we use are paraben-free, phthalate-free, and are never (ever) tested on animals. M&SENSE scents are meant to enhance a space rather than overpower it, and are especially ideal for people with scent sensitivities.

Room Filling & Long Lasting : These Scented candles are designed to burn for 90-110 hours when properly cared for. The net weight of wax is 19.4oz/550g. Recommended to use in rooms smaller than 26 square meters. Our high-quality formulas have been tested to perform for an extended period of time.

Various Scents for Many Gift Occasions : Makes a perfect candle gift for men/dad/boyfriend/brother/teacher! For any occasion: Happy Birthday, Mother's day, Father's Day, Anniversary Gift, Friendship, Thanksgiving Day, Valentine's Day.
